audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with Isaiah/Ezekiel/new Jerusalem imagery; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for new heaven/earth, New Jerusalem, no more death, Alpha/Omega, city measurements, no temple, nations' glory.

verses.restored: And I saw new heaven and new earth, for first heaven and first earth went away, and sea is no more.
And I saw the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from the Divine, prepared as bride adorned for her husband.
And I heard great voice from throne saying: Look, dwelling of Divine is with humans, and he will dwell with them; they will be his peoples, and Divine himself will be with them.
And he will wipe every tear from their eyes, and death will be no more; neither grief nor crying nor pain will be anymore, because first things went away.
The One sitting upon throne said: Look, I make all things new. And he says: Write, because these words are trustworthy and true.
And he said to me: They have happened. I am the Alpha and Omega, beginning and completion. To the thirsty I will give from spring of water of life freely.
The one conquering will inherit these things, and I will be Divine to that one, and that one will be child to me.
But for cowardly, untrusting, abominable, murderers, sexually misusing, sorcerers, idolaters, and all liars, their part is in lake burning with fire and sulfur, which is second death.
One of seven messengers with seven bowls came and spoke with me, saying: Come, I will show you the bride, the wife of the Lamb.
And he carried me away in Spirit upon great high mountain and showed me holy city Jerusalem coming down out of heaven from Divine,
having glory of Divine, its radiance like very precious stone, like jasper, clear as crystal.
It had great high wall, twelve gates, and at gates twelve messengers, and names written, which are names of twelve tribes of sons of Israel.
From east three gates, north three, south three, west three.
The wall of city had twelve foundations, and on them twelve names of twelve apostles of Lamb.
The one speaking with me had golden measuring reed, so he might measure city and gates and wall.
The city lies four-square; its length as great as width. He measured city with reed: twelve thousand stadia; length, width, height are equal.
He measured its wall: one hundred forty-four cubits, measure of human, which is of messenger.
Its wall-building was jasper, and city pure gold like clear glass.
Foundations of city wall were adorned with every precious stone: jasper, sapphire, chalcedony, emerald,
sardonyx, carnelian, chrysolite, beryl, topaz, chrysoprase, jacinth, amethyst.
The twelve gates were twelve pearls; each gate from one pearl, and street of city pure gold like transparent glass.
And I saw no temple in it, for Lord Divine Almighty is its temple, and the Lamb.
The city has no need of sun nor moon to shine on it, for glory of Divine illumined it, and its lamp is the Lamb.
The nations will walk through its light, and kings of earth bring their glory into it.
Its gates will certainly not be shut by day, for night will not be there.
They will bring glory and honor of nations into it.
Nothing common and no one doing abomination or lie may enter, but only those written in Lamb's scroll of life.

translation_notes: New Jerusalem unites Israel tribes and Lamb apostles; continuity and fulfillment together, not erasure.
No temple means Divine/Lamb presence fills the city, not anti-temple contempt.
Nations bring glory into city; restoration is international and creation-positive.
safety_note: Revelation 21 is restoration, not escape: tears wiped, death ended, city descends, nations healed into light.
